title: The Crypto Group Chat
scenario: Your college group chat is buzzing about a cryptocurrency that 'tripled in a week'. A friend swears he made ₹50,000 and urges you to put in ₹25,000 before you 'miss out'. You do not really understand how the coin works.

choices.label: Stay out, read up on how it actually works, and risk only what you can lose later
choices.lesson: FOMO is not a strategy. Never invest in something you cannot explain, and only ever risk money you can fully afford to lose.

choices.label: Throw in ₹25,000 to chase the rally before it climbs further
choices.lesson: Hype-driven assets are highly volatile and often peak right as newcomers pile in. You usually hear about the wins, never the wipeouts.
